title: hypericum pruinatum
intro: Hypericum pruinatum is a species of flowering plant in the St. John's Wort family, native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Europe. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly due to its high concentration of hypericin and hyperforin, which have anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Hypericum pruinatum include its potential to reduce anxiety and depression, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. It is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and capsules, and can also be used as a topical cream or oil to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
